description: Execute V0.8 Hotfix: Resolve the '404 Not Found' error on npmjs.org by preparing the packages (root framework and mcp-server) for npm publication.
scope: 1. Update root package.json to include mcp-server scripts (npm run mcp). 2. Add a 'prepublishOnly' build script to compile TypeScript. 3. Document the manual npm publish instructions in the README so the human maintainer can execute the final 'npm publish'.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of the Node.js DAG execution runner (V0.9). NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of this patch progression. Cannot perform the actual interactive 'npm publish' or interactive 'npm login'.
stop_conditions: Attempting to run an interactive npm login.
Attempting to modify source code in src/ or bin/ beyond dependency management.
